  "findings": [
    "Grounding electrode conductor (GEC) is spliced improperly, violating NEC requirements for a continuous conductor."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-run the grounding electrode conductor as a single, continuous length without splices, or use an approved irreversible compression-type connector or exothermic welding to join the segments."
  ],
  "rationale": "The grounding electrode conductor (GEC) must be continuous without splice or joint unless spliced by irreversible compression-type connectors listed for the purpose or by exothermic welding, as per NEC 250.64(C). An improper splice compromises the integrity of the grounding path, creating a high-risk safety hazard.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.64(C)"
  ]
}
